subject: [DCAE] Update application config properties in slice-analysis-ms
commit_message:
[DCAE] Update application config properties in slice-analysis-ms

- Add new application config properties
- Add new dmaap subscribers properties
- Update slice-analysis-ms image version to 1.1.1

Issue-ID: DCAEGEN2-3124
Signed-off-by: decheng zhang <decheng.zhang@huawei.com>
Change-Id: I9fa1bbcbce9ce03d6b02d857037e9e0c5333df66
Signed-off-by: decheng zhang <decheng.zhang@huawei.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 13 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Hi, this commit contains app properties updates in slice-analysis-ms, including update image version to 1.1.0. Thanks

readiness check doesn't pass

  Normal   Started    79s               kubelet            Started container dcae-slice-analysis-ms
  Warning  Unhealthy  3s (x3 over 18s)  kubelet            Readiness probe failed: Get "http://10.42.0.172:8080/healthcheck": dial tcp 10.42.0.172:8080: connect: connection refused

Need further investigation
